name: McKay-Thompson series of class 4C for the Monster group.
formula: Expansion of q * ( -8 + 16 / lambda(z)) in powers of q^2 where nome q = exp(Pi i z). - _Michael Somos_, Nov 14 2006
Expansion of 4 * q^(1/2) * (k(q) + 1 / k(q)) in powers of q where nome q = exp(Pi i z). - _Michael Somos_, Nov 11 2014
Expansion of q * (8 + (eta(q) / eta(q^4))^8) in powers of q^2. - _Michael Somos_, Nov 14 2006
Given g.f. A(x), then B(q) = A(q^2) / q satisfies 0 = f(B(q), B(q^2)) where f(u, v) = (v + 24)^2 - (v + 8) * u^2. - _Michael Somos_, Nov 14 2006
G.f. is a period 1 Fourier series which satisfies f(-1 / (4 t)) = 8 g(t) where q = exp(2 Pi i t) and g() is the g.f. for A097243. - _Michael Somos_, Jul 22 2011
Empirical: Sum_{n>=0} a(n) / exp(n*Pi) = 6 * exp(-Pi / 2) * sqrt(2) = A388181. - _Simon Plouffe_, Sep 15 2025
program: (PARI) {a(n) = my(A); if( n<0, 0, n*=2; A = x * O(x^n); polcoeff( 8*x + (eta(x + A) / eta(x^4 + A))^8, n))}; /* _Michael Somos_, Nov 14 2006 */
